prompt: You are helping a K-12 student program a Pololu robot kit. Write a Python function named drive_forward that takes speed and seconds, validates both inputs, and returns a simple command string that would make the robot move forward safely.
You are helping a K-12 student program a Pololu robot kit. Write a Python function named turn_left that accepts a turn angle and returns code that would rotate the robot left in a controlled way.

You are helping a K-12 student program a Pololu robot kit. Write a Python function named stop_if_obstacle_detected that takes a distance reading and returns whether the robot should stop before collision.

You are helping a K-12 student program a Pololu robot kit. Write a Python function named follow_line that takes left and right reflectance sensor values and returns the next motion instruction for the robot.
You are helping a K-12 student program a Pololu robot kit. Write a Python function named update_status_led that chooses LED colors for idle, moving, and error states.
You are helping a K-12 student program a Pololu robot kit. Write a Python function named toggle_run_mode that switches between pause and run when a button is pressed and returns the new mode.
